title: Set of Wham 50Lt High Grade Plastic Black Flip Top Waste Rubbish Bin (2)
features: 2 X Large 50 litre capacity Midnight Black Gloss finish Swing Bin lid Style.
Material - Made from lightweight, yet durable and hard wearing Plastic.
Easy to clean - easy to clean plastic with removable lid and lid holder, Wipe with a damp cloth or sponge.
Approximate Dimensions - 40.00 x 33.00 x 66.50 cm Weight: 1.689 kg.
Extremely versatile and Food Safe - Great for a range of different uses from household rubbish to storing a variety of products or animal feed great for recycling.
